---
title: "NIS2 Compliance in Romania"
title-block-style: none
description: "NIS2 compliance services for Romanian businesses. Navigate DNSC requirements, meet EU cybersecurity obligations, and protect your organization with local expertise from Craiova."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #81BD4A; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:70vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">chen.ist</div>
    <h1>NIS2 Compliance<br>in <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Romania</span></h1>
    <p>Local expertise for EU cybersecurity compliance. DNSC-aligned, practical, and available in Romanian.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/booking/" class="ev-btn">Book a consultation</a>
      <a href="#affected" class="ev-btn-ghost">Who is affected?</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS BAR -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">EUR 10M</div><div class="m-nl">Max fine (essential)</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">EUR 7M</div><div class="m-nl">Max fine (important)</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">Oct 2024</div><div class="m-nl">Transposition deadline</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">2,000+</div><div class="m-nl">Entities affected in RO</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- WHO IS AFFECTED -->
<div class="m-s" id="affected" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Who is affected in Romania?</h2>
    <p class="sub">Key sectors under NIS2 obligations with significant Romanian presence.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-lightning"></i><h3>Energy</h3><p>Petrom/OMV, Romgaz, Hidroelectrica, Nuclearelectrica, and electricity distributors across the national grid.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-heart-pulse"></i><h3>Healthcare</h3><p>Public hospitals, regional health authorities, pharmaceutical distributors, and medical device supply chains.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-train-front"></i><h3>Transport</h3><p>CFR and regional rail operators, CNAIR, airports, port authorities, and logistics companies.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-bank"></i><h3>Banking & Finance</h3><p>BNR-regulated institutions, commercial banks, payment processors, and financial market infrastructures.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-hdd-network"></i><h3>Digital Infrastructure</h3><p>Data centers, cloud providers, DNS operators, IXPs, and telecom networks including RCS&RDS and Orange.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-droplet"></i><h3>Water & Utilities</h3><p>Regional water companies, wastewater operators, and critical utility infrastructure across all counties.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-building"></i><h3>Public Administration</h3><p>Central and local government entities, national agencies, and public digital service providers.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-gear"></i><h3>Manufacturing</h3><p>Automotive suppliers, chemical plants, food production facilities, and other essential manufacturers.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- DNSC AUTHORITY -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/analyst-monitors.webp" alt="DNSC cybersecurity monitoring Romania"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>The supervisory authority:<br>DNSC.</h2>
        <p>In Romania, the <strong>Directoratul National de Securitate Cibernetica (DNSC)</strong> is the competent authority for NIS2 implementation and enforcement. DNSC oversees compliance, manages the national CSIRT, and coordinates incident reporting for all essential and important entities operating in Romania.</p>
        <p>Romania transposed the NIS2 Directive into national law, establishing clear obligations for affected organizations: mandatory risk assessments, incident reporting within 24 hours of detection, supply chain security measures, and management body accountability. Non-compliance carries penalties of up to EUR 10 million or 2% of global annual turnover for essential entities.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/services/nis2/" class="m-lk">View NIS2 requirements</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- LOCAL CREDIBILITY -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="chen.ist team in Romania"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>We understand<br>Romania.</h2>
        <p>chen.ist is headquartered in <strong>Craiova, Romania</strong>. We are not a foreign consultancy parachuting in with generic frameworks. We understand the Romanian business environment, the regulatory landscape, and the practical challenges organizations face when implementing EU directives locally.</p>
        <p>Our team works directly with Romanian businesses in their language, navigating the specifics of DNSC requirements, local sector regulations, and the intersection of NIS2 with existing Romanian cybersecurity law. From Bucharest enterprises to regional operators, we deliver compliance programs that work in the Romanian context.</p>
        <p><strong>Serviciile noastre sunt disponibile integral in limba romana.</strong></p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/booking/" class="m-lk">Schedule a consultation</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RELATED SERVICES -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Related services</h2>
    <p class="sub">NIS2 compliance is most effective as part of a broader security strategy.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-clipboard-check"></i><h3>NIS2 Compliance</h3><p>Full NIS2 assessments, gap analysis, and CISO as a Service for essential and important entities.</p><a href="/services/nis2/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i><h3>GDPR Compliance</h3><p>Data protection aligned with NIS2 security requirements. Many obligations overlap — address them together.</p><a href="/services/gdpr/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>Cybersecurity</h3><p>Blue team operations, threat hunting, and security monitoring to meet NIS2 technical requirements.</p><a href="/services/cybersecurity/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Ready to comply<br>with NIS2 in Romania?</h2>
    <p>Talk to our team in Craiova. Local expertise, EU-grade compliance, available in Romanian.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b">Book a consultation</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free initial assessment &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Romanian language &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> DNSC-aligned
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
